description.ko: 비와 크롬, 디지털 반사가 뒤섞인 지하 도시 시장이 네온빛으로 살아난다.
description.en: A neon-soaked undercity market glows through rain, chrome, and restless digital reflections.

prompt: NEON-V artwork titled "Prism Drain Bazaar": a street-level cyberpunk city scene beneath an elevated monorail viaduct during electric rain, focused on a crowded rain-harvesting market where chrome gutters, transparent pipes, and black ceramic paving mirror #FF00FF neon pink and #00FFFF neon blue signage. LED-mesh umbrellas form glowing canopies over food stalls, repair kiosks, cable bundles, oxidized metal shutters, and vending walls etched with futuristic urban grime. Deep #1A0033 violet shadows fill the underpass columns while #FF6B35 orange sparks from maintenance drones and welding booths streak through misty air. High particle density: rain beads, vapor bursts, floating dust, micro hologram fragments, and splashing droplets frozen in energetic mid-motion. Detailed cyberpunk city texture, reflective wet surfaces, neon romance, dense layered depth, sharp foreground details, luminous rainy reflections, medium-speed urban movement.
